messages.content: 翻译为英文：下雨了所以我带了伞
it rained so i brought an umbrella
翻译为英文：我们必须马上出发
we must leave immediately
翻译为英文：我们先去超市然后回家
we will first go to the supermarket then go home
translate to chinese: they decided to meet and discuss next week
他们决定下周开会讨论
translate to chinese: it rained so i brought an umbrella
下雨了所以我带了伞
翻译为英文：我希望能够早日康复
i hope to recover soon
translate to chinese: i hope to recover soon
我希望能够早日康复
翻译为英文：他终于完成了这个项目
he finally completed this project
翻译为英文：她已经准备好了
she is already prepared
翻译为英文：他常常忘记关灯
he often forgets to turn off the light
翻译为英文：我们需要尽快解决这个问题
we need to solve this problem as soon as possible
翻译为英文：他们打算明年结婚
they plan to get married next year
translate to chinese: we must leave immediately
我们必须马上出发
translate to chinese: i am waiting for him to come back
我正在等他回来
translate to chinese: i suggest you take a rest first
我建议你先休息一下
翻译为英文：他虽然是外国人但中文说得很好
although he is a foreigner he speaks chinese very well
translate to chinese: i remember coming here last time
我记得上次来过这里
translate to chinese: he was singing and dancing at the same time
他一边唱歌一边跳舞
translate to chinese: we will first go to the supermarket then go home
我们先去超市然后回家
translate to chinese: she always arrives very early
她总是很早就到了
翻译为英文：我从来没去过那个地方
i have never been to that place
translate to chinese: we need to solve this problem as soon as possible
我们需要尽快解决这个问题
翻译为英文：我建议你先休息一下
i suggest you take a rest first
translate to chinese: he often forgets to turn off the light
他常常忘记关灯
翻译为英文：我吃完饭就去散步
i will go for a walk after eating
translate to chinese: he finally completed this project
他终于完成了这个项目
翻译为英文：她不但聪明而且勤奋
she is not only smart but also hardworking
翻译为英文：我正在等他回来
i am waiting for him to come back
翻译为英文：她总是很早就到了
she always arrives very early
translate to chinese: she is already prepared
她已经准备好了
翻译为英文：他一边唱歌一边跳舞
he was singing and dancing at the same time
translate to chinese: although he is a foreigner he speaks chinese very well
他虽然是外国人但中文说得很好
翻译为英文：你既可以喝茶也可以喝咖啡
you can drink either tea or coffee
translate to chinese: they plan to get married next year
他们打算明年结婚
translate to chinese: you can drink either tea or coffee
你既可以喝茶也可以喝咖啡
translate to chinese: i will go for a walk after eating
我吃完饭就去散步
翻译为英文：我记得上次来过这里
i remember coming here last time
translate to chinese: i have never been to that place
我从来没去过那个地方
translate to chinese: she is not only smart but also hardworking
她不但聪明而且勤奋
翻译为英文：他们决定下周开会讨论
they decided to meet and discuss next week
